title: Ethereal Bow
description: Beautiful end game elven/fantasy style bow that releases a luminous energy beam with each shot. Very powerful but very expensive.
body: Beautiful end game elven/fantasy style bow that releases a luminous energy beam with each shot. Very powerful but very expensive. The recipe is in the screenshot. It does 20dmg unenchanted, so it's meant to be an endgame weapon after you defeat the Wither.
